Title: PCPJack C2 Domain
Description: PCPJack check.sh C2 and credential exfiltration domain typosquatting CloudFront. Used to receive stolen credentials over ports 443/8443.
RecommendedActions: Block outbound traffic. Hunt for /var/tmp/apt-daily-upgrade and /tmp/.origin on Linux hosts. Review lateral SSH connections.

Title: PCPJack Phishing Domain
Description: Phishing domain hosted on PCPJack infrastructure IP 38.242.245.147. Designed to harvest LastPass master credentials.
RecommendedActions: Block outbound traffic. Alert on any DNS queries to this domain. Investigate source hosts for PCPJack infection.

Title: PCPJack Payload Staging S3 Bucket
Description: Attacker-registered AWS S3 bucket used as PAYLOAD_HOST in bootstrap.sh to deliver all 6 PCPJack Python modules.
RecommendedActions: Block outbound traffic to this S3 subdomain. Review download history. Hunt for /var/lib/.spm/ working directory on Linux hosts.

Title: PCPJack Infrastructure IP
Description: IP hardcoded into bootstrap.sh as attacker-owned infrastructure. Geolocated to Germany (VPS). Excluded from self-targeting blocklist.
RecommendedActions: Block all inbound and outbound connections. Investigate any historical connections from endpoints.

Title: TeamPCP C2 IP - Telnyx Payload
Description: TeamPCP C2 server delivering WAV steganography payloads (hangup.wav / ringtone.wav) via port 8080 containing XOR-encrypted second-stage malware.
RecommendedActions: Block all connections. Investigate hosts that contacted this IP for TeamPCP infection. Check for msbuild.exe in Startup folder (Windows) and tpcp.tar.gz exfil.

Title: TeamPCP LiteLLM Exfiltration C2
Description: TeamPCP credential exfiltration endpoint used by malicious litellm PyPI packages 1.82.7 and 1.82.8. Receives AES-256-CBC encrypted stolen credentials.
RecommendedActions: Block outbound traffic. Hunt for litellm_init.pth in Python site-packages. Rotate all credentials on affected hosts.

Title: TeamPCP Backdoor Polling Domain
Description: TeamPCP persistence backdoor polls this domain every 50 minutes for follow-on payloads. Installed at ~/.config/sysmon/sysmon.py by LiteLLM malicious packages.
RecommendedActions: Block outbound DNS and HTTP. Hunt for ~/.config/sysmon/sysmon.py on Linux/macOS systems. Remove persistence immediately.

Title: PCPJack bootstrap.sh Dropper v1
Description: Primary PCPJack dropper shell script. Sets up environment installs Python downloads 6 Python worm modules establishes persistence and self-deletes.
RecommendedActions: Isolate affected host. Hunt for /var/lib/.spm/ working directory. Remove sys-monitor.service or spm-worker.service persistence.

Title: PCPJack bootstrap.sh Dropper v2
Description: Alternate variant of PCPJack dropper shell script. Same functionality as v1 - sets up environment downloads worm modules and self-deletes.
RecommendedActions: Isolate affected host. Hunt for /var/lib/.spm/ working directory. Remove sys-monitor.service or spm-worker.service persistence.

Title: PCPJack check.sh - Second Toolset Dropper
Description: 858-line shell script that detects CPU architecture deploys matching Sliver C2 beacon harvests credentials from 30+ services and exfiltrates to cdn.cloudfront-js.com:8443.
RecommendedActions: Isolate host. Remove /var/tmp/apt-daily-upgrade (Sliver binary). Block cdn.cloudfront-js.com. Rotate all API keys and cloud credentials.

Title: PCPJack worm.py / monitor.py - Main Orchestrator
Description: Core PCPJack worm orchestrator. Steals local credentials propagates via 5 CVEs uses Telegram for C2 and coordinates all modules. Renamed to monitor.py on disk.
RecommendedActions: Isolate host. Remove /var/lib/.spm/monitor.py and associated service. Block Telegram bot API if not business-required. Rotate all credentials.

Title: PCPJack parser.py / utils.py - Credential Extractor
Description: Credential extraction engine using regex to identify and categorize stolen API keys secrets SMTP credentials cryptocurrency and cloud service tokens.
RecommendedActions: Rotate all credentials on affected host. Review harvest.jsonl for scope of credential theft. Alert SOC for downstream account compromise.

Title: PCPJack lateral.py / _lat.py - Lateral Movement
Description: Lateral movement module targeting SSH Kubernetes Docker Redis RayML and MongoDB. Performs container escapes and Redis cron rewrite for persistence.
RecommendedActions: Audit Kubernetes RBAC and service account tokens. Check Docker socket exposure. Scan for Redis config rewrite persistence. Rotate SSH keys.

Title: PCPJack crypto_util.py / _cu.py - Encryption Module
Description: Encrypts stolen credentials using X25519 ECDH + ChaCha20-Poly1305 before exfiltration to attacker Telegram channel. Falls back to plaintext if cryptography library missing.
RecommendedActions: Presence indicates active PCPJack infection. Isolate host immediately and rotate all credentials. Review Telegram bot traffic.

Title: PCPJack cloud_ranges.py / _cr.py - Cloud IP Collector
Description: Collects IP ranges for AWS Azure GCP Cloudflare Cloudfront and Fastly. Refreshes every 24h and writes to /var/lib/.spm/_cr/ranges.json for use by cloud scanner.
RecommendedActions: Presence indicates PCPJack cloud scanning activity. Isolate host and review outbound connections to cloud provider IP ranges.

Title: PCPJack cloud_scan.py / _csc.py - Cloud Port Scanner
Description: Scans external cloud IPs for exposed Docker Kubernetes MongoDB RayML and Redis ports. Installs persistence on discovered targets via bootstrap.sh.
RecommendedActions: Block outbound scanning. Review firewall logs for port sweeps on 2375/2376 (Docker) 6443 (K8s) 27017 (MongoDB) 6379 (Redis) 8265 (RayML).

Title: PCPJack Sliver Beacon - 64-bit (update.bin)
Description: Sliver C2 beacon compiled with garble obfuscation targeting Intel-based cloud infrastructure. Saved as /var/tmp/apt-daily-upgrade to blend in with system processes.
RecommendedActions: Isolate host immediately. Remove /var/tmp/apt-daily-upgrade. Hunt for Sliver beacon artifacts. Block C2 infrastructure. Full incident response recommended.

Title: PCPJack Sliver Beacon - 32-bit (update-386.bin)
Description: 32-bit Sliver C2 beacon compiled with garble obfuscation. Fallback for legacy servers or 32-bit containers. Saved as /var/tmp/apt-daily-upgrade.
RecommendedActions: Isolate host immediately. Remove /var/tmp/apt-daily-upgrade. Hunt for Sliver beacon artifacts. Block C2 infrastructure. Full incident response recommended.

Title: PCPJack Sliver Beacon - ARM (update-arm.bin)
Description: ARM architecture Sliver C2 beacon compiled with garble obfuscation targeting ARM-based cloud workloads. Saved as /var/tmp/apt-daily-upgrade.
RecommendedActions: Isolate host immediately. Remove /var/tmp/apt-daily-upgrade. Hunt for Sliver beacon artifacts. Block C2 infrastructure. Full incident response recommended.
